headline: Woman Says 'I'm Not A Morning Person' Then Wakes Up At 4 AM To Go Hiking, Make It Make Sense
summary: She's a morning person only for 'experiences,' not for 'responsibilities.'
fullBody: Amanda Contradiction sleeps through her 9 AM meetings but wakes at 4 AM for 'spontaneous sunrise hikes.' 'It's different,' Amanda explained, sipping coffee at dawn. 'The mountains don't have deadlines.' She has called in sick to work due to 'exhaustion' after a weekend of 'aggressive adventuring.' Her boss is 'confused but afraid to ask.' Amanda's alarm clock has a split personality: off for weekdays, on for 'living my best life.'
